channel.title: Endgame on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Endgame on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: DSP Quantum Chips & Proliferator: Advanced Production Guide
item.description:
Every factory has a ceiling. At some point you're running 40 assemblers on your Circuit Board chain and wondering if there's a better way. In DSP v0.10, there is: Proliferator.

It's a resource you produce, spray onto your production lines, and watch your output climb without adding a single new assembler.

This guide covers the Quantum Chip production chain and explains the Proliferator system — what it is, how to produce it, what it does, and how to use it without turning your factory into a confusing mess of spray towers.

item.title: DSP Solar Sails & Ray Receivers: Complete Endgame Power Guide
item.description:
You've got a handful of coal power plants. Maybe you've built a wind farm or twelve. You're researching toward the stars 鈥?literally 鈥?and then it hits you: the Dyson sphere isn't just the goal, it's the power solution. To get there, you need Solar Sails and Ray Receivers working in tandem.

One launches into orbit and reflects stellar radiation. The other catches that energy and converts it into usable power for your planet.
